# Convergence render-ledger: human-facing, provisional, notAuthority

## Context

Leaf 3 of epic #14581 (Convergence-weighted Golden Path), graduated from Discussion #14548. This is the **render leaf**: it renders the convergence snapshot as a human-facing ledger — provisional-labeled, `notAuthority` — the concrete surface the Leaf 1 (#14633) render-target resolved to. Long-run home: a terrain panel in the FM cockpit.

## The Problem

Convergence output is **decision-support for humans**, explicitly **not** an authority agents consume (the OQ8 self-fulfilling firewall must hold end-to-end, not just at compute). If the ledger were treated as ground truth by any agent boot-path, convergence would re-enter generation and become self-fulfilling. So the render must:

1. Present the snapshot as a **provisional** artifact — convergence is a hypothesis about invariance, never a mandate.
2. Carry a **`notAuthority`** flag so no agent boot-path treats it as ground truth — the firewall preserved from schema (Leaf 1) through compute (Leaf 2) to render (Leaf 3).

## The Architectural Reality

- **Consumer:** humans (a maintainer reading the terrain of which sub-goals are cross-future-invariant). NOT agents.
- **Home surface:** a terrain panel in the FM cockpit (agents never boot from the cockpit); interim home is a standalone ledger artifact.
- Consumes Leaf 2's compute output over Leaf 1's canonical-id schema. This leaf is the human-facing terminus of the firewall chain.

## The Fix

- Render the convergence snapshot as a **human-facing ledger**, provisional-labeled.
- Attach the **`notAuthority`** flag; assert no agent boot-path consumes the ledger (firewall preserved).
- Target the **FM-cockpit terrain panel** as the home surface (interim: standalone ledger artifact).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Convergence snapshot rendered as a human-facing ledger, provisional-labeled.
- [ ] `notAuthority` flag present; a test asserts no agent boot-path consumes the ledger (firewall preserved end-to-end).
- [ ] Renders Leaf 2's compute output over Leaf 1's canonical-id schema (no re-compute, no id re-derivation).
- [ ] Home surface named and wired to the interim standalone ledger artifact; FM-cockpit terrain panel declared as the long-run home.
- [ ] Coverage for provisional / `notAuthority` labeling + the no-boot-path-consumption invariant.

## Out of Scope

- Compute (Leaf 2) and schema (Leaf 1 / #14633).
- The fold-rung deliverable (gated).
- Full FM-cockpit terrain-panel UI polish (this leaf ships the ledger + labeling + firewall assertion; cockpit panel visual integration is tracked with the FM cockpit lane).

## Related

Epic #14581 · blocked-by Leaf 2 (needs compute output) · Discussion #14548 · FM cockpit lane (#13015 family) as the long-run home surface.

## Decision Record impact

`aligned-with ADR-0023`; `depends-on ADR-0024` (renders the Leaf 1 node class). No new ADR authority introduced.
